steps.title: Specify the discovery location
steps.content: The student's goal is to say where Discoglossus nigriventer was identified. The relevant note says a living specimen was identified in Israel in 2011 after the species had been believed extinct.

steps.title: Remove unrelated species details
steps.content: A discusses Dysphania pusilla, not Discoglossus nigriventer. C explains the Lazarus species category but gives no location. D gives the year but omits Israel, the location requested. The answer is B.
